title: Registered office and registered agent for service of process
doc_html:
§104.  Repealed by Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.

Acts 1968, No. 105, §1.  Amended by Acts 1976, No. 460, §1; Acts 1978, No. 232, §1; Acts 1987, No. 769, §1; Acts 1988, No. 99, §1; Acts 1991, No. 334, §1; Acts 2001, No. 1187, §1; Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
